reason: Existing production-owner and staging-only handlers overlap. Remove the production-unconditional duplicate in the D3 privilege-boundary batch.

POS cutover #11a: categoryHeroBlobHandler is registered both by the categories router and by the pre-auth publicScmImages proxy (public-images.ts, mounted at /api/scm BEFORE the global auth in index.ts) so the cross-origin 2990 POS can load category heroes with a plain (no bearer). Same exported handler; the pre-auth mount wins by ordering. Intentional.

POS cutover #11a: modelPhotoProxyHandler is registered both by the authed product-models router and by the pre-auth publicScmImages proxy (public-images.ts) so the cross-origin 2990 POS can load Model hero photos with a plain (no bearer). Same exported handler; the pre-auth mount wins by ordering. Intentional.
